---
title: "Distributing Narrative Authority"
aliases: []
family: "Systems & Mechanics"
media: []
facets:
  effects: []
  problems: []
  components: []
  genre: []
provenance: ""
---

<!-- STUB — Phase 2 outline. Prose gated until Phase 4. Tracked in #49. -->

<!-- BACKLINKS:START (generated by scripts/backlinks.py — do not edit by hand) -->

## Referenced by

- [GM Role Models & Stances](../players-social-dynamics/gm-role-models-and-stances.qmd)

- [Rulings vs Rules & the Authority Contract](../players-social-dynamics/rulings-vs-rules-and-the-authority-contract.qmd)

<!-- BACKLINKS:END -->
